title: SGMH Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 21 Junior Resident Posts
description: Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital (SGMH Delhi) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 21 Junior Resident Posts. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the SGMH Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all ...
